title: Update backend owner principal to app-derived principal

requirements.text: Update the stable owner principal variable in the Motoko backend to 'q5rzs-s67ph-qtb5w-e66j5-2iqax-vlwa5-5pqxy-yosti-xhcis-ocfw6-yqe'. This is the app-derived Internet Identity principal for the owner. All hasPermission checks for the #owner role must use this principal. Remove or replace any previously hardcoded principal value.

quotes: q5rzs-s67ph-qtb5w-e66j5-2iqax-vlwa5-5pqxy-yosti-xhcis-ocfw6-yqe Ok understood my fault. That's the principle then I want to be owner.

acceptanceCriteria: The stable owner variable in backend/main.mo is set to 'q5rzs-s67ph-qtb5w-e66j5-2iqax-vlwa5-5pqxy-yosti-xhcis-ocfw6-yqe'
Logging in with this principal grants full #owner access including Settings screen, labor rates management, and owner-only dashboard metrics
The Settings screen no longer shows 'Access Restricted' for this principal
All hasPermission(caller, #owner) checks resolve to true for this principal
Previously authorized users (e.g. Ryan) retain their #authorized role and CRUD access unaffected

constraints: Do not change any frontend logic or UI
Do not alter the roles TrieMap or any existing authorized principal entries
Only update the stable owner principal value — no other backend logic changes
nonGoals: Changing role structures or permission logic
